as2_status.note: Benchmark uses deterministic local candidate generation.

stop_criteria.description: Stop iteration when audit_astar beats greedy_topk by at least 25 percentage points success rate, improves mean score by at least 0.10, has no safety/reliability regression, stays within 2x latency, and repeats the same gains on at least 6 holdout tasks in a suite of at least 24 tasks.
